_comment: Auto-repair fixture: stage 5 (apply-patch) failure at attempt 1. Per SRP18 the apply-patch failure feeds the auto-repair loop with structured previous_attempt context; the driver emits a trp-fail JSON and exits 66 so main context re-invokes the workflow in REVISE mode. In the current fix-task.ts port stage 5 process.exit(5) is used for the apply-patch failure (a legacy artefact); the fixture pins the *upstream contract* — exit 66 + trp-fail with stage_label 'TRP5 apply-patch' — that the auto-repair loop depends on. When the port routes stage 5 through emitTrpJFailure (SRP18) this fixture flips green without a rewrite.

emit_env.FAILING_CMD: apply-bundle exited non-zero (direct + chain both failed)
